project: kcl/thashset — port of FPC rtl-generics THashSet (TCustomSet surface + set algebra) to bash (kklass instantiable class over the tdictionary storage pattern)
status: PLANNED — plan + ledger only, no implementation yet. Roadmap position 6/7.
notes: Single source of truth for thashset status. Plan: kcl/thashset/PLAN.md. Source: generics.collections.pas TCustomSet :513-566 (Add/Remove/Extract Boolean trio, AddRange :550, UnionWith :2853, IntersectWith :2861 two-pass, ExceptWith :2878, SymmetricExceptWith after :2878) + THashSet :570-612 (backed by TOpenAddressingLP<T,TEmptyRecord> :574 — FPC's set IS a dictionary with empty values; Extract :3019 Default(T) on miss; Clear :3031). Bash port = tdictionary storage minus values + the set algebra (the actual payoff: Union/Intersect/Except/SymmetricExcept replace eternal hand-rolled loops). All storage idioms arrive pre-validated by tdictionary tests/002. Entirely Tier A. Workflow: phase -> dual-bash -> master sweep -> STOP -> 'go'; commits gated.

baseline.measured: 2026-07-12 — at roadmap planning time (post-tdictionary). RE-MEASURE at P0: roadmap units 1-5 will have raised the totals.

suites_green.kcl_breakdown: tcustomapplication 320, tdirectory 197, tfile 120, tlist 92, tpath 112, tstringhelper 393, tstringlist 155, dateutils 123, math 81, tdictionary 130

baseline.regression_rule: thashset work must keep the (re-measured) baseline green; the new suite adds on top.

design_decisions.storage: ${__inst__}_items assoc, membership items["k$item"]=1 — tdictionary idioms VERBATIM (k-prefix for empty-subscript safety, ${ref[pk]+x} existence, single-quoted unset 'ref[$pk]', ${k#k} strip, __ts_ local prefix). count computed = ${#items[@]}. Reduced torture subset in tests (full 34-key matrix already proven in tdictionary/tests/002).
design_decisions.boolean_rc: Add rc0=added/rc1=present-SILENT; Remove rc0=removed/rc1=absent-SILENT — FPC set Booleans, NOT errors (loud contrast with TDictionary's raise-on-dup Add and always-rc0 Remove; README comparison box because the units will be used side by side).
design_decisions.set_algebra: FPC loop semantics cloned: UnionWith = Add each of other's snapshot; IntersectWith = TWO-PASS :2861 (collect victims, then remove — self-intersect is a defined no-op); ExceptWith = Remove each of other's snapshot; SymmetricExceptWith pinned at P0 (self-case must yield empty set). Operand validated as a live THashSet BEFORE any mutation (atomicity — the Assign lesson). Event order on algebra ops = hash iteration order, UNSPECIFIED (tests set-compare).
design_decisions.events: Single onNotify property + public virtual Notify seam + _notifyHook guard (house pattern; unhooked cost = one [[ -n ]]). No TObject* set subclass exists in FPC — seam is future-proofing, documented.
design_decisions.extract_ambiguity: Extract miss -> RESULT='' rc 0 (Default(T), :3019) — identical shape to extracting a stored '' element; disambiguate via Contains first (same pinned ambiguity as tdictionary ExtractPair).

goals: Faithful TCustomSet surface with Boolean-rc contract and FPC-exact algebra semantics incl. defined self-operation edges.
Set algebra truth tables proven against hand-computed results on all operand shapes (disjoint/subset/superset/overlap/empty).
Zero forks; O(1) membership riding the native assoc; PATH='' tests; bench flat 1k vs 10k.
TDictionary-vs-THashSet difference table as a first-class doc deliverable.

test_basis.seed_primary: rtl-generics/tests scanned at P0 for set fpcunit coverage (mined if present).

parity_model.tier_A_exact: Membership lifecycle, Boolean rcs, algebra results, event sequences (set-compared), Extract ambiguity shape — byte-for-byte vs source-pinned semantics (S1-S9 in PLAN section 3).

test_basis.new_coverage_protocol: Non-FPC cases (ToArray/ForEach/Assign/AddRangeFromArray extras, reduced torture, zero-fork, self-op edges beyond FPC tests) -> TEST_COVERAGE_NOTES.md rows.

out_of_scope.item: Comparer ctor Create(IEqualityComparer) :602, TOpenAddressingLP backend, capacity family (Capacity/SetCapacity/TrimExcess :562-563)
out_of_scope.reason: tdictionary API-v2 precedent verbatim: declare -A is the backend; comparers cannot back assoc lookups; capacity controls nothing in bash.
Balanced trees are pointless over a native hash; ordered iteration = TArray.sort over ToArray output at the boundary (README example).
Internal representation; bash stores literal 1 as the value.

phases.goal: READ SymmetricExceptWith/AddRange-Boolean/self-op impls (S3/S7/S8); verify S1/S2/S4/S5/S9; skeleton + runner; reduced torture; baseline re-measure.

tasks.title: Skeleton (Create/Destroy/count) + reduced storage torture + runner + baseline re-measure
tasks.acceptance: Green on both bashes; baseline recorded.

tasks.title: Membership lifecycle with Boolean-rc contract, '' element, Extract ambiguity, Clear/Destroy models (S4/S5)
tasks.acceptance: Lifecycle + ambiguity + extras green; zero-fork; dual-bash; sweep gate.

tasks.title: Four algebra ops (FPC loop semantics, two-pass intersect) + AddRange/AddRangeFromArray + truth tables + self-op edges + operand validation atomicity
tasks.acceptance: Truth tables green on all operand shapes; a∩a=a, a∪a=a, a∖a=∅, a⊕a=∅ per source pins; invalid operand leaves set untouched; dual-bash; sweep gate.

phases.name: Events
phases.goal: onNotify/Notify/_notifyHook + recorders on all mutation paths.

tasks.title: Event plumbing + recorder tests (membership ops exact-sequence; algebra ops set-compared) + dangling-cb/rc-ignored edges
tasks.acceptance: Sequences per S9; hook-less cost = one string test; dual-bash; sweep gate.

phases.name: Docs, bench, closeout
phases.goal: README + docs/THashSet.md + bench + coverage notes + final sweep.

tasks.title: README.md (API + TDictionary-vs-THashSet comparison box + sorted-iteration composition example) + docs/THashSet.md (upstream FPC reference per kcl docs convention)
tasks.acceptance: Every public member + wontfix documented; comparison box complete.

tasks.title: bench.sh (Add/Contains per-op, 1kx1k Union/Intersect, O(1) flat, zero-fork), timed via TStopwatch.getTimeStamp (shared kcl bench clock — source ../tstopwatch/tstopwatch.sh; do NOT hand-roll _now_us) + TEST_COVERAGE_NOTES finalization + final sweep, ledger COMPLETE
tasks.acceptance: Numbers recorded; final master sweep green.

execution_log.summary: thashset PLAN.md + ledger written; folders created. No implementation. Key decisions recorded: storage = tdictionary minus values (idioms verbatim, reduced re-torture); Boolean-rc Add/Remove SILENT (answers, not errors — loud README contrast with TDictionary); algebra ops clone FPC loop semantics incl. two-pass IntersectWith and defined self-op edges (pinned at P0); Extract miss shares the Default(T) '' ambiguity with ExtractPair; sorted sets wontfix (compose TArray.sort at the boundary).
